extra.cluster_ssc_note: Coefficients match at rel < 1e-15. The CR1 cluster SE differs by 1.27% because sp.fast.feols applies the simple G/(G-1) cluster small-sample correction while fixest::feols applies the multi-factor ssc(cluster.adj = TRUE, fixef.K = "nested", cluster.df = "min") convention by default. This is the same family of df-convention differences as the iid SE gap reported in Module 03.
